posts.caption: Vietnam workshop recap. Streets of Hanoi, mountain communities and rice terraces of Mù Cang Chải, fishing villages in central Vietnam.

posts.highlight: 越南行摄复盘 · 梯田到渔村
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose. posts.caption_en: June has been a busy one! Wrapped up a 10-day Vietnam workshop — Hanoi streets, mountain rice terraces of Mu Cang Chai, fishing villages along the coast.
posts.caption_zh: 六月太充实了！越南十天工作坊收官——河内街头、木仓寨梯田、中部渔村。

posts.caption_en: The September Vietnam workshop is coming up — 10 days through northern and central Vietnam, rice terraces Mu Cang Chai, fishing communities along the coast.

posts.caption: Sony camera travel photographer reel. Rain-soaked forests in Nicaragua, Saudi Arabia deserts, Norway Northern Lights, European autumn scenery.

posts.highlight: 镜头走遍世界 · 从雨林到极光
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose. Natural lighting, photorealistic, square composition, no text, no watermark.
posts.description_zh: 电影感旅拍：尼加拉瓜雨林、沙特沙漠、挪威极光、欧洲秋景
posts.caption_en: Since 2018, my Sony camera has been more than just gear — it has been my passport to the world. 🌍📷 Rainforests in Nicaragua, deserts of Saudi Arabia, Northern Lights in Norway, European autumn.
posts.caption_zh: 2018年起，索尼相机不只是装备——它是我走遍世界的通行证 🌍📷 尼加拉瓜雨林、沙特沙漠、挪威极光、欧洲秋景。
